title: consolidate Azure providers, rewrite image tests as dynamic
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Spring cleaning the test suite
gist.blurb: We've completely rewritten our image testing suite to dynamically discover and test new models the moment they're added. Plus, we consolidated our Azure providers under the hood for a cleaner, more efficient backend.
gist.summary: Refactored the image generation test suite to dynamically discover models from the registry and consolidated Azure providers to a single endpoint.
gist.impact: This streamlines our internal infrastructure, making it faster and safer for maintainers to add new image models to the platform.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot in a cozy testing lab. The robot is scanning a dynamically growing list of models, while Polly organizes glowing blue blocks representing the consolidated Azure endpoints.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute bee mascot organizing glowing blue blocks in a cozy server room while a chunky monitor-headed robot scans a long printout of code. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
